spec.description: process, event loop, heap, and HTTP metrics. Multi-app, multi-pod aware.

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, pod, route) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{app="$app", env="$env"}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.title: p99 Latency per Pod per Route (spot pod outliers)
p99 Latency by Route (all pods merged)
@realtechltd/prom-client
